title: Fork link sidecar (links.json)
description: Non-aiDeck-facing sidecar holding the fork parent/child link for a plan. Lives at <planDir>/links.json. Kept out of plan.md / phase frontmatter so the aiDeck 0.1.0 .strict consumer is unaffected; inline migration is deferred to F5 (aiDeck >= 0.1.2).

spawnedFrom.description: Child→parent edge: which plan/phase (and optional task) this plan was forked from, and the fork mode.

spawnedPlans.description: Parent→child edges, keyed by the anchor phaseId: the child plan slugs forked from each phase.
